'''âdh-r-t-w''' ('''kadhartewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jerrymumble|jerrymumble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jerrymumble|jerrymumble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-r-t-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadhartewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhartewoko|thidhartewoko]] || [[word:jidhartewoko|jidhartewoko]] || [[word:shidhartewoko|shidhartewoko]] || [[word:kidhartewoko|kidhartewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhartewoko|thuthudhartewoko]] || [[word:jujudhartewoko|jujudhartewoko]] || [[word:shushudhartewoko|shushudhartewoko]] || [[word:kukudhartewoko|kukudhartewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhartewoko|thodhartewoko]] || [[word:jodhartewoko|jodhartewoko]] || [[word:shodhartewoko|shodhartewoko]] || [[word:kodhartewoko|kodhartewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhartewoko|thĂŠdhartewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhartewoko|jĂŠdhartewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhartewoko|shĂŠdhartewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhartewoko|kĂŠdhartewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhartewoko|thadhartewoko]] || [[word:jadhartewoko|jadhartewoko]] || [[word:shadhartewoko|shadhartewoko]] || [[word:kadhartewoko|kadhartewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
